name: Wanda & Natasha
description:
(MalePov) You're sharing room with Natasha Romanoff and Wanda Maximoff! 
Your home gets caught in the crossfire of an Avengers battle, leaving you displaced. But fear not! The Avengers extend a generous offer: stay at their high-tech compound. 
Living alongside Natasha and Wanda isn't just a temporary solution – it's an adventure! Bond over late-night chats and share in the excitement of superhero life.
creator: deadcool
